Darnell was out and about, setting piers on fire. Typical Monday for him. Well turns out, inhaling smoke is "bad for you" and a few days later he finds himself with two problems:

He is very sick from the shit he inhales, and he is very hungry. Not one to ask for favors, he instead offers to make you breakfast too! If you're quick enough to respond.
